title: Nomad
description:
First mod, be gentle.
This mod adds a mob called the Nomad, and 2 structures to go along with him.
body:
Search far and wide to find the elusive Nomad. Who knows, you may even find some rubies or even a music disc.

This mod adds:
  The Nomad: a creature who appears human, but is actually an emissary from a distant plane.
  2 Structures: a Nomad Camp and a Nomad House, both of which contain a chest.
  The Ruby: a new gem which can be used to make blocks and the following items.
  Ruby Smithing Template: Used to make tools and armor. Crafted with a Netherite Smithing Template, Gold Ingots, and a Ruby.
  Ruby Armor: an armor set that gives helpful buffs as well as being a good armor set.
  Ruby Tools: a tool set that has buffs like the armor.
  Ruby Staff: a magical weapon that can be smithed using an Empty Staff (crafted with Gold Ingots), a Ruby Smithing Template, and a Ruby.
  A Music Disc: I made it myself. It's better now. It is only found in Nomad Camp Chests.
